title: Tool Replacement
description: A mod that automatically replaces broken tools with a new one from the inventory.
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)



🛠️ Tool Replacement

Tool Replacement is a sophisticated quality-of-life modification that streamlines inventory management by automatically handling tool durability transitions. When a tool breaks during gameplay, the mod intelligently scans the player's inventory for a compatible replacement and seamlessly equips it, maintaining workflow continuity without manual intervention.
🎯 Perfect For:

Mining expeditions
Building projects
Resource gathering

📞 Support
Need assistance or have suggestions? Contact @5sam_h
